## Use case

(What are you trying to do? What problem does this solve?)

## Why existing options don't suffice

(Optional but helpful — what did you try first?)

## Proposed API or behavior

(A rough sketch of how this would work. Code blocks, mockups, or
references to other projects are welcome.)

## Alternatives considered

(Any other ideas you ruled out and why.)

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I'd like to discuss further before committing
